spec.subject: a simple hard-surface mesh cube with clean topology and beveled edges

lighting.key: neutral white from camera-left, 5500K, primary illumination
lighting.fill: cool grey bounce from camera-right, 7500K, half the key intensity
lighting.rim: subtle backlight separating subject from background

palette.accent: slight warm specular highlight on beveled edges

composition.foreground: clean empty studio floor, subtle reflection plane
composition.midground: the beveled cube, centered in frame

materials.notes: roughness ~0.4, slight metallic value 0.2, no texture maps, clean uniform shading to show topology clearly
roughness ~0.8, subtle specular, near-zero reflectivity to keep focus on mesh

density.scattered: none — single isolated mesh, no scattering
density.control: no variation needed; single object placement

spec.scale_notes: Cube is 1m x 1m x 1m real-world scale. Bevel width ~0.02m on all edges. Scene reads at roughly 3m wide from camera position. Keeps mesh at a neutral Blender default scale for clean topology review.
